title: DMARC Policy Not Detected
description: Mail infrastructure was identified but a DMARC policy was not detected.
impact: Missing DMARC weakens domain spoofing resistance and can reduce protection against phishing abuse.
likelihood: Medium because spoofing opportunities depend on mail usage and receiving-side enforcement.
recommendations: Publish and validate a DMARC policy for sending domains.
Align SPF and DKIM coverage with the DMARC rollout plan.
Monitor for mail flow impact before moving to stricter enforcement.
